title: GPS delivery tracking of the vehicle to Location
excerpt: Wondering if possible to add an integration to generate a link for delivery tracking. ETA of a vehicle with a tracker to Location entered.

posts.author: MariusB (Marius Brazlauskis)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if possible to add an integration to generate a link for delivery tracking. ETA of a vehicle with a tracker to Location entered.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
What service are you using to track your deliveries?

If the delivery service has an API available it should be possible to get it integrated with Monday.com

posts.author: MariusB (Marius Brazlauskis)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using Abax to track our vehicles.
As far as I know Abax support API just need an idea how to transfer vehicle location to Monday.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
It should be possible then if Abax has an API available

You could use the Monday.com API to get both Abax and Monday.com integrated with each other
i.e transfer vehicle location from Abax to Monday.com

Hope this helps!

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MariusB

If you’re still trying to figure this out, our workflow team would be happy to help. We’ve worked on similar solutions in the past. Grab a time with us →
